Class GoogleGenAiChatProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.model.google.genai.autoconfigure.chat.GoogleGenAiChatProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.ai.google.genai.chat") public class GoogleGenAiChatProperties extends Object
Configuration properties for Google GenAI Chat.
Since:
1.1.0
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Hyunsang Han, Sebastien Deleuze
